name: "Example Upgrade"
desc: "Example Upgrade Description Goes Here"

name: No Upgrade Pack
desc: No Upgrade Pack Selected

name: Charlie Don't Surf (Ends in A)
desc: Gain +2 Capacity. If the planes name currently ends in A, then it also gains +2 A2A. It now ends in C.

name: Charlie Don't Surf (Doesn't End In A)
desc: Gain +2 Capacity. If the planes name currently ends in A, then it also gains +2 A2A. It now ends in C.

name: Slam Package (Conversion)
desc: Convert any aircraft into a Strike Craft. If it is already a Strike Craft, gain +1 Survivability and +1 A2G.

name: Slam Package (Already in a Strike Craft)
desc: Convert any aircraft into a Strike Craft. If it is already a Strike Craft, gain +1 Survivability and +1 A2G.

name: X Package (Ends in C)
desc: If a plane ends in E, gain +1 A2A, +2 Capacity, and +1 Survivability. If it ends in C, gain +2 Survivability and +2 A2A. Then add an X to the end of its name.

name: X Package (Ends in E)
desc: If a plane ends in E, gain +1 A2A, +2 Capacity, and +1 Survivability. If it ends in C, gain +2 Survivability and +2 A2A. Then add an X to the end of its name.

name: EJ-Kai Package (No Matchign Tags)
desc: Gain AOA and Multicrew. If you already had one, gain +1 A2A. If you had both, gain +1 A2A and +1 A2G

name: EJ-Kai Package (1 Matching Tag)
desc: Gain AOA and Multicrew. If you already had one, gain +1 A2A. If you had both, gain +1 A2A and +1 A2G

name: EJ-Kai Package (2 Matching Tags)
desc: Gain AOA and Multicrew. If you already had one, gain +1 A2A. If you had both, gain +1 A2A and +1 A2G

name: Verusan Upgrade Scheme
desc: Change intrinsic to Not Just a Flanker. Change plane designation to J-

name: 33 Package
desc: Gain Navalised and +1 Surv

name: SM Package
desc: Gain +2 Capacity. Additionally: If you're in a Flanker gain +1A2A. If you have Not Just a Flanker, gain +1 Speed but lose -1A2G

name: SM Package (Flanker Instrinic)
desc: Gain +2 Capacity. Additionally: If you're in a Flanker gain +1A2A. If you have Not Just a Flanker, gain +1 Speed but lose -1A2G

name: SM Package (Not Just a Flanker Intrinsic)
desc: Gain +2 Capacity. Additionally: If you're in a Flanker gain +1A2A. If you have Not Just a Flanker, gain +1 Speed but lose -1A2G

name: SM2 Package
desc: SM2 Package: Gain +1 Survivability, +1 Manu.

name: Stalker Package
desc: Add two crew members to your plane, turn it into an EWO, lose -1 cap and -1 surv

name: Mewler Package
desc: Add an EWO to your plane, turn your plane into an EWO and gain Multicrew

name: Foxy Lady Package
desc: Add a WSO. Gain Multicrew, +1 A2G and Targeting Equipment

name: M Package (None)
desc:
Replace your end letter with an M (or add it if it didn't have one before). 
If it had no letter, gain +1 to A2A and Speed. 
If you replaced an A, gain +1 Surv and A2A.
If you replaced a B, gain +2 Capacity and +1 Surv.
If you replaced a C, gain +1 A2G and +1 Manu.
If you replaced an E, gain +1 to A2A, Manu, and Speed.

name: Chasing The Wind Package (Doesn't end in A)
desc: Gain +1 Survivability. If the plane's name currently ends in A, then it also gains +1 A2G. It now ends in C.

name: Chasing The Wind Package (Ends in A)
desc: Gain +1 Survivability. If the plane's name currently ends in A, then it also gains +1 A2G. It now ends in C.

name: Vodka Pack
desc: Take a -1 to A2A, A2G, and Survivability. At the end of each mission you go on, gain 20RP as you siphon your avionic's alcoholic coolant to sell to your mates.
